sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, ref_iri VARCHAR(255), nullable_col VARCHAR(255) NULL);

INSERT INTO test_data (id, ref_iri, nullable_col) VALUES (1, 'http://example.com/valid', NULL), (2, 'http://example.com/blank', 'some data'), (3, '', 'another data'), (4, 'http://example.com/valid/iri', NULL);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT (?o)) FROM (SELECT ?s, ?p, ?o WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(IsRef(?o)) }) AS subquery;
SELECT ?s, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT ?s, ?p, ?o WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(IsRef(?o)) }) AS grp GROUP BY ?s HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT ?s, bif:exec('SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ?o) WHERE { ?s ?p ?o . FILTER(IsRef(?o)) }') AS dynamic_count FROM test_data WHERE IsRef(ref_iri) = TRUE GROUP BY ?s;
SELECT ?s, COUNT(?o) FROM test_data WHERE IsRef(ref_iri) AND nullable_col IS NOT NULL GROUP BY ?s HAVING COUNT(?o) >= 2;

SELECT ?s, bif:exec('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE id < 3 AND IsRef(ref_iri)') AS count_result FROM test_data WHERE ref_iri IS NOT NULL AND ref_iri != '' GROUP BY ?s ORDER BY count_result DESC;
SELECT ?s, bif:exec('SELECT CONCAT(?o, ": Type") AS type_check FROM test_data WHERE IsRef(ref_iri)') AS type_check_result FROM test_data WHERE IsRef(ref_iri) GROUP BY ?s;
